task.title: Verify CSS determinism contract
task.author: agent:B
task.goal: Trace Zenith CSS determinism contract to implementation
task.next: Obtain zenith_compiler crate source (packages/compiler/src/script.rs and packages/compiler/src/compiler.rs) to verify whether compile_structured_with_source normalizes the id parameter to forward slashes for module_id, and whether it enforces duplicate (module_id, order) uniqueness before returning CompilerOutput.style_blocks

handoffs.title: Handoff from agent:B
handoffs.summary: Stopped after tracing the compiler input boundary in zenith_loader.rs. Confirmed LF normalization is applied before compile_structured_with_source, but could not verify module ID canonicalization or duplicate (module_id, order) enforcement inside the compiler because zenith_compiler source files are not listed in repository evidence.
handoffs.author: agent:B
handoffs.context: Use topological sort for CSS: CSS blocks are ordered by dependency depth via compiler sort

accepted_decisions: Use topological sort for CSS: CSS blocks are ordered by dependency depth via compiler sort
completed: Verified LF normalization at compiler input boundary: compile_zen_source applies source.replace("\r\n", "\n") before calling compile_structured_with_source

Identified that resolve_id uses std::fs::canonicalize (OS-specific separators) and compile_zen_source passes id to compiler without forward-slash normalization — module ID canonicalization is not enforced at the bundler-to-compiler boundary

Confirmed compiler source files (zenith_compiler::script, zenith_compiler::compiler) are not available in repository evidence, blocking further verification of internal compiler normalization and duplicate identity enforcement
structured_handoff.stopping_point: Stopped after tracing the compiler input boundary in zenith_loader.rs. Confirmed LF normalization is applied before compile_structured_with_source, but could not verify module ID canonicalization or duplicate (module_id, order) enforcement inside the compiler because zenith_compiler source files are not listed in repository evidence.
